ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol used in stock exchanges */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap_category" TEXT /* Market capitalization category (e.g., Large, Mid, Small) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the industry belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the financial metrics were recorded */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividends paid by the company */,
  "fcfps" REAL /* Free cash flow per share */,
  "earnings_growth" REAL /* Earnings growth percentage */,
  "de_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "mcap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_financials" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical financial entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the historical financial metrics were recorded */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue earned by the company */,
  "net_income" INTEGER /* Net income earned by the company */,
  "total_assets" INTEGER /* Total assets owned by the company */,
  "total_liabilities" INTEGER /* Total liabilities owed by the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
